package.title: Network Operations Practice Simulator
package.description: Scenario-based practice package for triage, CLI interpretation, and configuration review.

front.text: Users at a branch report complete loss of WAN connectivity. Which command should you run first to confirm whether the WAN interface is operational?

back.text: Confirm administrative and protocol state before moving deeper into routing or provider escalation.

front.text:
GigabitEthernet1/0/18 is up, line protocol is up
  5 minute input rate 220000 bits/sec
  5 minute output rate 180000 bits/sec
  1843 input errors, 1810 CRC, 0 frame, 0 overrun
  0 output errors, 0 collisions
What should the operator investigate first?

back.text: Investigate the physical path first: cabling, optics, patching, and link negotiation. A high CRC count points to Layer 1 corruption rather than a routing issue.

front.text:
interface GigabitEthernet1/0/24
 description Printer
 switchport mode access
 switchport access vlan 310
 spanning-tree portfast
What should be verified before approving this change?

items: VLAN 310 exists and is the intended printer VLAN.
The endpoint is not another switch or shared infrastructure device.
PortFast is permitted by the access-layer standard for this endpoint class.

front.text: Which command quickly verifies whether an IPv4 default route is present in the routing table?
A provider ticket is required for intermittent packet loss. What evidence should be attached before escalation?

items: Affected circuit and timestamps with timezone.
Any local changes already ruled out.
